mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO weather_log ( district_code, base_time, temperature, cloud_low, cloud_mid, cloud_high, ghi ) VALUES
(#{item.districtCode}, #{item.baseTime}, #{item.temperature}, #{item.cloudLow}, #{item.cloudMid}, #{item.cloudHigh}, #{item.ghi})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE temperature = VALUES(temperature), cloud_low = VALUES(cloud_low), cloud_mid = VALUES(cloud_mid), cloud_high = VALUES(cloud_high), ghi = VALUES(ghi), updated_at = NOW()
